_doc: Mowing manifest configuration. Management rule: lots whose Owner Information in the PayHOA Member Contact CSV matches a name in developerOwnerNames are Hacienda (developer-managed, BLUE). All other lots are HOA-managed (GREEN, or RED if 90+ days past due in the Aging CSV). Use managedLots entries below to override on a per-lot basis (e.g. force HOA management for Lot #1 + common areas) or to apply a special pricing class.

managedLots.notes: Lot #1 + common areas — always HOA-managed regardless of CSV presence
